sections.heading: Kite Size Calculator | Free Kitesurfing Kite Size Chart by Weight & Wind
sections.content: Use this kite size calculator to instantly determine the ideal kite size in square meters (m²) using proven formulas. Free kite size chart by weight and kite size wind calculator deliver accurate results tailored to real-world conditions.

sections.heading: How to Use This Calculator
sections.content: Enter your values in the calculator above and click calculate to see instant results. Adjust inputs to compare scenarios and find the option that fits your needs.
